---
name: Missing/Wrong Item Sorting
about: A Product or Item is in the wrong place, or missing all together.
title: "[PRODUCT] <product name>"
labels: Missing Product/Item, Update Product/Item
assignees: manix84

---

**What's the products name?**
A clear, simple name of the product. (EG: Oatmeal)

**Are there any other names the product goes by?**
Can you think of any other names the product has? (EG: Porridge, Gruel, etc)

**Are there any variants of this product?**
Can you buy this in different falvours? (EG: Cinnemon, Apple, Golden Syrup, etc)

**What measurements do you buy this product in?**
When buying this product, does it come in a single size, or can you buy different sizes? (EG: 100g, 1kg, 1oz, Small, Large)

**Additional context**
Any other information you think is needed for adding this product? (EG: It's worth trying. Try it with raisins.)
